title: Grilled Veal Ceviche Skewers
description: A refreshing and zesty skewer dish, perfect for a summer evening. Delicate veal and smoky flavors blend together beautifully.

ingredients.name: Smoky olive oil
ingredients.notes: use a smoky olive oil for best flavor

instructions: Thread veal cubes and red onion slices onto skewers.
In a small bowl, mix together Algerian spice blend, lime juice, and smoky olive oil.
Brush the spice blend mixture onto both sides of the veal and onion.
Grill skewers for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, or until veal is cooked to 145°F (63°C).
Remove skewers from heat and sprinkle with chopped cilantro.
Let skewers rest for 2-3 minutes before serving.
